feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Automatic Account Determination content download - S4 public cloud
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

has anyone ever needed to download the full content of the automatic account determination app?

Is there a way? Any way?

entry.title: CIM- Unable to submit invoices SCIM, system is showing error message a technical error occurred.
entry.content:
CIM- Unable to submit invoices, system is showing error message a technical error occurred. The invoice could not be saved in the connected system. Please try again later. If the problem persists, contact your administrator.

Central invoice management system is keep showing the error message for all of the company codes, we have verifiried the connection set up in BTP, its showing connection to S4 is good. Did anyone else has faced this issue earlier or any suggestion to look into this error message.

there is no message number assigned in the

entry.title: Message =Data loss occurred when converting 20244900000941
entry.content:
I am Trying to create a custom situation handling scenario where a notification will be triggered after every FG Goods movement, it will help the Logistic team to plan dispatch activities.

For this purpose I have created a custom situation object using Event Object "CL_MMIM_MATDOC_EVENT" i.e Material Document Created. And further created Situation Scenario and Type Accordingly. When I run the Situation type using batch trigger i get the appropriate notification

 

But when triggering an Event I get the following Error "Message =Data loss occurred when converting 20244900000941" it is unable to separate Document Year and Number.

Thanks & Regards

Ashish Talekar

Situation Handling SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud @Saumitra @ana_goncalves

entry.title: How to change the form title of the dunning notice output
entry.content:
We would like to change the form title (output PDF file name) of the dunning notice.

For billing document form title we can do via SSCUI 102402 Define Billing Types for Sales.

(KBA 3004546 https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3004546)

But where I can do the same for dunning notice and letter?

(We manage to change what is shown on the PDF including title, but found not way to change the output PDF file name)

entry.title: Customer service process tutorials for inhouse process(3XK), on-site process, service orders
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am looking for tutorials for customer services (In house repair, On-site Repair) in sap Hana public cloud.

Kindly do needful.

Thanks & Regards,

Rajeswari. B

entry.title: WHERE CAN I FIND CONFIGURATION GUIDES FOR S/4 HANA 2308
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm working on S/4 HANA Public Cloud and need the Configuration Guides for the Treasury area. Many thanks for pointers on where these resources are on SAP's world wide web!

entry.title: Issue in Creating GSTR2 Report ,Unable To Find Assessable Value Data Source and add Storage Location
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Hope you all are doing great,

I am creating GSTR2 Report for Accounts Payable Process in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud. It is a Compliance Report for India. Standard Report is not available so we are creating it by using CDS View app. I am facing Following Errors and unable to proceed further.

  1. I have added Supplier Invoice Data source, while adding Storage Location from Material Document Item data source multiple entries are generating as there is no Data Source available for Line item like Supplier Invoice Item Data Source. Please advise Is there any way to add Storage location so that Multiple entries should not generate.
  2. My client is using Custom Duty Process for which they are booking Custom Duty and GST on Assessable Value but in CDS View, I am unable to get the Assessable Value. Can you Please Suggest if any Data Source is available for Assessable value or How to add the Tax amount calculated on Assessable value. 

 

 

Thanks and Regards,

Shreshtha Pareek

entry.title: Updating Bank master data after Golive with Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Hello

I found a line in the migration object information help for "Bank" as below. 

Do Not Overwrite Existing Data

This is an indicator field to determine whether or not to overwrite an existing bank.

If the indicator field is empty, the system overwrites an existing bank. If you don’t want to overwrite an existing bank, enter X.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/cc9ecc5f5f6b400a98d10e930324f7ad/216ce7ce1cad45a68e2486ca4203da69.html?locale=en-US

It seems we can perform mass change for bank master data in the system. I thought it would be great if we can still use this function on a daily base even after Golive. For example, item field: Bank Groups or text.

Does anyone know if that is possible and have the experience?

Kind Regards,

Eitaro

entry.title: Hi team,I have a question regarding Scope Item 2YM: do we need MBC or Cash Management to sell it?
entry.content:
Hi team,

I have a question regarding Scope Item 2YM: do we need MBC or Cash Management to sell it?

 

we have an S/4 Public cloud deal and we need to know if we need to position MBC or Cash Management (DDA says it but it doesn't appear in the list of scope items).

 

Thanks !

entry.title: Badi MM_PUR_S4_PO_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE - NETPRICEAMOUNT field
entry.content:
Hi All, 

In s/4 Public cloud, based on note 3268822 - Field Control in Purchase Orders and Purchase Requistions in S/4HANA Cloud 

we are trying to implement BADI MM_PUR_S4_PO_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE to hide NETPRICEAMOUNT field.

Field NETPRICEAMOUNT is visible in the debug, as a field possible to influence, and listed in the BADI description in SAP help 

App Extensibility: Manage Purchase Orders 

Is there any other possibility to hide specific field (in this case NETPRICEAMOUNT on PO item level) in S4H Public?

entry.title: S4HC/应收票据认领问题
entry.content: HI,SAP专家 应收票据认领时，生成如下会计凭证： 借：应收票据1121010000——客户 贷：应收账款1122010000——客户 但是，该分录不能满足我们的业务需求，我们想要生成如下会计凭证，能否实现？ 借：应收票据1121010000——银行 贷：应收账款1122010000——客户

entry.title: Purpose of valuation class
entry.content: I come from the SAP Business One space and part of a S/4 project and in the material master there is a concept I am trying to wrap my head around. It is the Valuation class.

entry.title: In S/4 Hana Cloud, public ed. no SCC1 App to transport CBC configuration between D100 and D080.
entry.content:
Hi,

In S/4 Hana Cloud, public ed. I can't find any SCC1 option to transport CBC configuration between D100 and D080. Duplicating manually the configuration from D100 to D080 is an option but it takes too much time. 

We wanted to have a DEV Environment with no transactional data so that we could potentially reverse same configuration...and push CBC configuration to D080, and test there in D080...if ok, it would be pushed from D100 to Q100 to be tested by the client.

This is how we do it in on-prem implementations.

So, what is the best practice in S/4 Hana Cloud, public ed...no way to push from D100 to D080?

thank you

entry.title: Hello EXPERTS, to create a PM feature, in which FIORI application can I do it?
entry.content:
I need to create characteristics to use in measurement points, I know how to do it with transaction CT04 but in SAP FIORI I don't know the APP

Necesito crear características para utilizar en puntos de medición, se como hacerlo en con la transaccion CT04 pero en sap FIORI desconozco la APP

entry.title: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
entry.content:
2023年11月份使用S/4HANA Public Cloud CPI调用API_BUSINESS_PARTNER接口创建客户，运行一年均正常。2024年2月份升级到2402升级之后，该接口无法运行。
希望了解 API_BUSINESS_PARTNER 接口目前的参数与2402之前有何不同，以便我们进行接口调整。

尝试过查What's New Viewer 没查到，可能查的不对
https://help.sap.com/whats-new/7d3d11840a6543329e72391cf4d48e2d?Category=API&Version=SAP%20S%2F4HANA%20Cloud%202302%20%28HFC3%29%3BSAP%20S%2F4HANA%20Cloud%202302&locale=en-US

entry.title: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER after ES 2402 Ugprade
entry.content:
During Nov 2023,  S/4HANA Public Cloud CPI worked fine to use API_BUSINESS_PARTNER to create users. After ES upgraded to 2402 version in this Feb 2024, API_BUSINESS_PARTNER  can't work.
Appreciate the guidance if any new API and the working model. 

Failed to find it via What's New Viewer, not sure if there are some relevant KBA Notes. Thanks.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud API to read output PDF of service quotation
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any S4HC standard API to read output PDF of service quotation?

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: Return Sales Order for Variant Configuration material in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am facing the issue to perform customer return for Variant configuration material in SAP Public cloud.

There is one document type which i could use for the customer return which is CBAR with the item category RENV assigned to this document type.

Could anyone enlighten me which document type i supposed to use for customer return specifically for Variant configuration material in SAP Public Cloud?

Thanks,

Ferdi

entry.title: How to activate Goods Receipt Based IV Permanently on Manage Purchase Order App?
entry.content:
Hey All

Hope you all are doing well. I have One issue related to Manage Purchase Order App on SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud. 

Issue:

Manage Purchase Order Advanced APP - Invoice Tab-  GR BSD IV

While Posting Purchase Order Transaction we are manually activating this Feild. Is there any way where we can activate this field Permanently for all users so while posting any transaction users do not need to activate it again and again. For Reporting Purpose we need this field. Please let me know if any steps are available for the same.

 

Your help is valuable. Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Inspection result was not transferred to batch classification with UD
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am trying to set up the transfer of inspection result to batch classification characteristic. The batch characteristic is linked to the master inspection characteristic, RR is done and then UD is set.

 

Unfortunately, no result is transferred - can you help me on that? The adjusted expiration date is succesfuly transferred from QA11 to batch classification characteristic LOBM_VFDAT.

 

Thanks!
